name: kimi-code-usage
description: Monitor your Kimi Coding Plan API quota with aesthetic precision.
author: Haining Yu

kimiCodeUsage.language.description: Display Language / 显示语言 (Requires restart / 重启插件后生效)

kimiCodeUsage.apiKey.description: Kimi API Key / 密钥 (Or set via KIMI_API_KEY env var / 或通过 KIMI_API_KEY 环境变量设置)

kimiCodeUsage.baseUrl.description: API Base URL / API 基础地址

kimiCodeUsage.refreshIntervalMinutes.description: Refresh interval in minutes / 自动刷新频率 (分钟)

kimiCodeUsage.weeklyLowThresholdPercent.description: Weekly low quota threshold (%) for red status bar warning / 每周低余量阈值(%)，低于时状态栏变红

kimiCodeUsage.fiveHourLowThresholdPercen.description: 5-hour low quota threshold (%) for red status bar warning / 5小时低余量阈值(%)，低于时状态栏变红

kimiCodeUsage.showPaceIndicator.description: Show pace indicator (Warp/Impulse/Moonwalk) / 显示速度指针（曲率/脉冲/月球漫步）

kimiCodeUsage.paceLabels.description: Advanced: custom pace labels by state (fast/normal/slow) / 高级：自定义速度状态名称

fast.description: Label for fast state / 快用状态名称

normal.description: Label for normal state / 正常状态名称

slow.description: Label for slow state / 慢用状态名称

kimiCodeUsage.paceIcons.description: Advanced: codicon names by pace state (fast/normal/slow) / 高级：按状态配置 Codicon 名称
kimiCodeUsage.paceIcons.markdownDescription:
Advanced: codicon names by pace state (fast/normal/slow). See [VS Code Icon Reference](https://code.visualstudio.com/api/references/icons-in-labels) for available names.

高级：按状态配置 Codicon 名称。可用图标请参考 [VS Code 官方图标列表](https://code.visualstudio.com/api/references/icons-in-labels)。

fast.description: Codicon for fast state / 快用状态图标

normal.description: Codicon for normal state / 正常状态图标

slow.description: Codicon for slow state / 慢用状态图标

kimiCodeUsage.paceTheme.description: Pace label theme preset / 速度指针主题预设

kimiCodeUsage.paceSensitivity.description: Pace threshold sensitivity. Relaxed=1.2/0.8, Normal=1.12/0.88, Strict=1.05/0.95, Custom=manual / 阈值灵敏度：Relaxed=1.2/0.8、Normal=1.12/0.88、Strict=1.05/0.95、Custom=自定义

kimiCodeUsage.paceThresholdFast.description: Threshold for 'using too fast'. Leave unset to use sensitivity preset. / '用得太快'的阈值，留空使用灵敏度预设。
kimiCodeUsage.paceThresholdFast.markdownDescription:
Pace ratio = (used ÷ limit) ÷ (elapsed time ÷ total window). When ratio ≥ this value, the indicator shows "using too fast". Leave unset to use sensitivity preset.

速度比率 = (已用量 ÷ 限额) ÷ (已过时间 ÷ 总窗口)。比率 ≥ 此值时指针显示「用得太快」，留空使用灵敏度预设。

kimiCodeUsage.paceThresholdSlow.description: Threshold for 'using too slow'. Leave unset to use sensitivity preset. / '用得太慢'的阈值，留空使用灵敏度预设。
kimiCodeUsage.paceThresholdSlow.markdownDescription:
Pace ratio = (used ÷ limit) ÷ (elapsed time ÷ total window). When ratio ≤ this value, the indicator shows "using too slow". Leave unset to use sensitivity preset.

速度比率 = (已用量 ÷ 限额) ÷ (已过时间 ÷ 总窗口)。比率 ≤ 此值时指针显示「用得太慢」，留空使用灵敏度预设。

commands.title: Show Usage Details / 查看用量详情
